name: quicken-mac-mcp
description: Read-only access to your Quicken For Mac financial data

database_path.title: Database Path
database_path.description: Path to your .quicken/data file. Leave empty to auto-detect from ~/Documents.

tools.name: list_accounts
tools.description: List all Quicken accounts with name, type, and active/closed status. Optionally filter by account type.

tools.name: list_categories
tools.description: List all Quicken category tags with their parent category hierarchy. Filter by expense or income.

tools.name: query_transactions
tools.description: Query transactions with filters: date range, account types/names, amount range, payee search, category. Returns one row per split entry.

tools.name: spending_by_category
tools.description: Aggregate spending by category or parent category for a date range.

tools.name: spending_over_time
tools.description: Monthly spending totals over a date range, optionally broken down by category.

tools.name: search_payees
tools.description: Search payees by name with transaction counts.

tools.name: list_portfolio
tools.description: List investment holdings with shares, cost basis, and optional live or stored price quotes.

tools.name: raw_query
tools.description: Run arbitrary SELECT queries against the database (500-row limit).
